flow-definition.description: Build RPM package on Linux x86_64.<!-- Managed by Jenkins Job Builder -->

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: GIT_TAG_NAME
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: The Git tag to create an rpm package from.

hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition.name: PUBLISH
hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition.description: When set to true, the resulting RPMs will be published to GitHub.
